description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark gray and natural wood paneling, with large windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The front facade includes a covered entryway with a wooden slat screen, a balcony on the upper floor, and a small porch area. The house has multiple rooms visible through the windows, including a living area, bedrooms, and a bathroom. A tree is positioned near the front, and the property is bordered by wooden fencing on one side. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on straight lines and open spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, dark gray and wood exterior, large windows, and a covered entryway with a balcony above.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, wooden slat screen, balcony, and a tree in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper balcony, multiple windows, and the continuation of the wood and gray facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid dark gray wall with minimal windows and a small back entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a large window, wooden fencing, and the side of the balcony.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with wooden slat screen, single main door, small porch, and balcony above
